ddls:
CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist or group performing the song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song or collection */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label producing the record */,
  "number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the record */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Condition grade of the record (e.g., E, VG+) */,
  "defects" TEXT /* Noted defects on the record */,
  "min_bid" REAL /* Minimum bid price for auctioning the record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the record was produced */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the record (e.g., Vinyl, 78 RPM) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the music */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the record's condition */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the record is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the music store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the music store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for inquiries about the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the store */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the record was sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the record sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping the record (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Manager, Sales Associate) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being bid on */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date the bid was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)
